nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Cloudy, with a low around 61. East wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Cloudy, with a high near 69. Northeast wind 8 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms likely. Cloudy, with a low around 59. Northeast wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Partly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 8am. Partly sunny, with a high near 78. Northeast wind 3 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 61. South wind around 6 mph.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 88. Southwest wind 6 to 10 mph.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 67. Southwest wind 6 to 10 mph.

nws.name: Friday
nws.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2pm and 4pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Partly sunny, with a high near 90. West wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Mostly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 7pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 9pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 66. Northwest wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Rain Showers
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers after 5pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 84. Northeast wind 5 to 8 mph.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 63. North wind around 5 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 86. Northeast wind 3 to 7 mph.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.shortForecast: Partly Cloudy then Slight Chance Rain Showers
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers after 4am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 64. South wind around 7 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers. Mostly sunny, with a high near 86. Southeast wind 6 to 10 mph.
